title: Beginner JavaScript
description: Learn JavaScript from the ground up with interactive lessons and hands-on coding exercises.
footer: Learn to code with interactive lessons and challenges

home.heroSubtitle: Master the fundamentals of JavaScript programming with interactive lessons, code playgrounds, and quizzes.

blocks.content:
## Welcome to Beginner JavaScript!

This course is designed to take you from zero to confident JavaScript programmer. You'll learn:

- **Core Language Concepts**: Variables, data types, operators, and control flow
- **Functions**: How to write reusable code
- **Objects & Arrays**: Working with complex data structures
- **DOM Manipulation**: Interacting with web pages
- **Events & Interactivity**: Building interactive applications

Each lesson includes code playgrounds where you can write and test JavaScript in real-time. Try the example below!

blocks.title: Try Your First Program
